sections.paragraph:
Original: לוחשׁ

Transliteration: lôchêsh

Phonetic: lo-khashe'

BDB Definition:

Hallohesh = "whisperer"
  1. father of a chief of Jerusalem after the exile who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah

Origin: active participle of H3907

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
